HediffDef.label: neuro-stabilizer
HediffDef.description: An installed neural dampening module that regulates emotional spikes and suppresses panic responses. The recipient is far less likely to suffer mental breaks, but reports a persistent mental fog that slightly impairs higher cognition.

ThingDef.label: neuro-stabilizer
ThingDef.description: A neural dampening module designed for cranial implantation. It regulates emotional volatility and suppresses panic responses, making the recipient far more resistant to mental breaks at the cost of slightly dulled cognition. (Implant)

HediffDef.label: reflex cortex
HediffDef.description: An installed cortical accelerator that stimulates the brain's motor and spatial processing centers. Grants significantly faster reflexes in combat at the cost of slightly increased emotional volatility.

ThingDef.label: reflex cortex
ThingDef.description: A cortical accelerator designed for cranial implantation. It stimulates the brain's motor and spatial processing centers to grant faster reflexes in combat. (Implant)

HediffDef.label: thermal regulator
HediffDef.description: An installed subdermal thermal management system. It actively heats or cools the body to maintain homeostasis in extreme environments, allowing comfortable operation in conditions that would incapacitate an unaugmented human.

ThingDef.label: thermal regulator
ThingDef.description: A subdermal thermal management system designed for torso implantation. It actively maintains body temperature homeostasis across extreme environments. (Implant)

HediffDef.label: mnemonic amplifier
HediffDef.description: An installed cranial implant that enhances synaptic plasticity and memory encoding. The recipient learns skills noticeably faster as the implant optimizes synaptic pathway formation.

ThingDef.label: mnemonic amplifier
ThingDef.description: A cranial implant that enhances synaptic plasticity and memory encoding. The recipient learns skills faster as the implant optimizes synaptic pathway formation. (Implant)

HediffDef.label: dermal lattice
HediffDef.description: An installed mesh of interwoven plasteel fibers beneath the skin. It provides meaningful resistance to sharp and blunt trauma without external armor.

ThingDef.label: dermal lattice
ThingDef.description: A mesh of interwoven plasteel fibers designed for subdermal implantation. It provides meaningful resistance to sharp and blunt damage without external armor. (Implant)

HediffDef.label: blade arm
HediffDef.description: An installed bionic arm with an integrated mono-molecular blade. When sheathed, the arm functions as a capable manipulator. When deployed, the blade extends for devastating close-quarters strikes.

ThingDef.label: blade arm
ThingDef.description: A bionic arm with an integrated mono-molecular blade. When sheathed, it functions as a capable manipulator. When deployed, the blade extends for devastating melee strikes. (Replacement)

HediffDef.label: piston leg
HediffDef.description: An installed bionic leg built around high-pressure pneumatic pistons that deliver explosive acceleration and devastating kick force. The pneumatic system delivers rapid acceleration and powerful strikes.

ThingDef.label: piston leg
ThingDef.description: A bionic leg built around high-pressure pneumatic pistons. Delivers explosive acceleration and a devastating kick, with integrated pneumatic pistons that deliver rapid acceleration and powerful kicks. (Replacement)

HediffDef.label: surge heart
HediffDef.description: An installed bionic heart with an integrated surge system that drives blood at elevated pressure, boosting cognitive function and physical output. A lattice-dust healing system allows it to recover from damage.

ThingDef.label: surge heart
ThingDef.description: A bionic heart with an integrated surge system that boosts cognitive function and physical output beyond standard bionic specifications. (Replacement)

HediffDef.label: tracker's nose
HediffDef.description: An installed bionic nasal implant packed with chemosensory arrays far more sensitive than natural olfactory tissue. The recipient can detect subtle chemical signatures in soil, vegetation, and animal pheromones, improving yields from farming and animal husbandry. The enhanced chemosensory arrays allow the recipient to detect subtle environmental signatures invisible to natural senses.

ThingDef.label: tracker's nose
ThingDef.description: A bionic nasal implant with chemosensory arrays far more sensitive than natural tissue. Improves farming and animal handling through detection of subtle chemical signatures, allowing detection of subtle environmental signatures invisible to natural senses. (Replacement)

HediffDef.label: service stud
HediffDef.description: A small plasteel stud surgically implanted into the frontal bone of the skull. Among spacer military cultures, these studs denote years of service and mark the bearer as a proven veteran. The visible modification commands respect from allies and unnerves prisoners during interrogation, but most civilians find the appearance unsettling.

ThingDef.label: service stud
ThingDef.description: A small plasteel stud designed for implantation into the frontal bone. Among spacer military cultures, these mark the bearer as a proven veteran. The visible modification commands respect and authority, though most find the appearance unsettling. (Implant)

HediffDef.label: myofiber lacing
HediffDef.description: An installed network of synthetic muscle fibers woven through the recipient's existing musculature. It provides a meaningful boost to raw physical strength without dramatically altering body mass, providing a meaningful boost to raw physical strength without dramatically altering body mass.

ThingDef.label: myofiber lacing
ThingDef.description: A network of synthetic muscle fibers designed to be woven through existing musculature. Boosts raw physical strength and carrying capacity. (Implant)

HediffDef.label: osteo-weave
HediffDef.description: An installed plasteel-ceramic composite woven through the recipient's skeletal structure. Bones are significantly more resistant to fracture and blunt trauma, and the reinforced frame supports heavier loads.

ThingDef.label: osteo-weave
ThingDef.description: A plasteel-ceramic composite woven through the skeletal structure. Greatly reduces blunt trauma damage and increases carrying capacity. (Implant)

HediffDef.label: vigilance node
HediffDef.description: An installed cranial implant that allows hemispheric sleep alternation. One half of the brain rests while the other maintains awareness, dramatically reducing the amount of sleep required. The recipient is never fully rested nor fully alert, existing in a perpetual twilight state.

ThingDef.label: vigilance node
ThingDef.description: A cranial implant that enables hemispheric sleep alternation. Dramatically reduces sleep requirements at the cost of a persistent consciousness penalty. (Implant)

HediffDef.label: auxiliary lung
HediffDef.description: An installed compact secondary lung that supplements primary respiration. Provides meaningful breathing capacity improvement and filters airborne toxins.

ThingDef.label: auxiliary lung
ThingDef.description: A compact secondary lung that supplements primary respiration. Boosts breathing capacity and provides significant toxin resistance. (Implant)

HediffDef.label: trauma shunt
HediffDef.description: An installed cranial emergency system that floods the brain with preservative compounds when damage becomes critical. The recipient can endure significantly more pain before losing consciousness. The shunt's standby chemicals create a persistent mental fog that slightly impairs cognition.

ThingDef.label: trauma shunt
ThingDef.description: A cranial emergency system that floods the brain with preservative compounds at critical damage thresholds. Dramatically increases pain tolerance at the cost of a persistent consciousness penalty. (Implant)

HediffDef.label: surge stomach
HediffDef.description: An installed bionic stomach with an accelerated enzymatic processing system. It extracts maximum caloric value from food with exceptional efficiency, allowing the body to recover energy faster and require less rest.

ThingDef.label: surge stomach
ThingDef.description: An advanced artificial stomach with an accelerated enzymatic processing system. Extracts maximum caloric value from food, reducing the body's need for sleep.

HediffDef.label: capacity lung
HediffDef.description: An installed bionic lung with an oversized oxygen exchange membrane. Greater oxygen saturation in the bloodstream sustains higher physical and mental output over extended work periods.

ThingDef.label: capacity lung
ThingDef.description: An advanced artificial lung with an oversized oxygen exchange membrane. Greater oxygen saturation sustains higher physical and mental output.

HediffDef.label: cleanser kidney
HediffDef.description: An installed bionic kidney tuned to aggressively identify and filter pathogenic material from the bloodstream. The enhanced filtration accelerates the body's immune response against infections and diseases.

ThingDef.label: cleanser kidney
ThingDef.description: An advanced artificial kidney tuned to aggressively filter pathogenic material. Accelerates immune response against infections.

HediffDef.label: hardened liver
HediffDef.description: An installed bionic liver engineered to metabolize environmental toxins with extreme efficiency. The enhanced processing capacity allows the recipient to operate in contaminated environments that would incapacitate an unaugmented human.

ThingDef.label: hardened liver
ThingDef.description: An advanced artificial liver engineered to metabolize environmental toxins with extreme efficiency. Provides significant toxic environment resistance.

HediffDef.label: analyst eye
HediffDef.description: An installed bionic eye optimized for rapid text scanning and data pattern recognition. Internal micro-displays overlay analytical information directly into the visual field, accelerating research and intellectual work.

ThingDef.label: analyst eye
ThingDef.description: An advanced artificial eye optimized for rapid text scanning and data pattern recognition. Accelerates research and intellectual work.

HediffDef.label: warden ear
HediffDef.description: An installed bionic ear tuned to detect vocal stress patterns, micro-hesitations, and emotional inflection. The enhanced auditory processing gives the recipient a significant edge in negotiations and social manipulation.

ThingDef.label: warden ear
ThingDef.description: An advanced artificial ear tuned to detect vocal stress patterns and emotional inflection. Provides a significant edge in negotiations.

HediffDef.label: combat jaw
HediffDef.description: An installed heavy-duty bionic jaw with hydraulic articulation and reinforced plasteel teeth. It restores full eating function and delivers a punishing bite in close-quarters combat.

ThingDef.label: combat jaw
ThingDef.description: An advanced artificial jaw with hydraulic articulation and reinforced plasteel teeth. Restores full eating function and delivers a punishing bite.

HediffDef.label: silver tongue
HediffDef.description: An installed bionic tongue with precise vocal modulation capabilities. Synthetic smooth-fibers connected through a neurogel interface allow exceptionally clear and persuasive speech, giving the recipient a natural advantage in social interactions.

ThingDef.label: silver tongue
ThingDef.description: An advanced artificial tongue with precise vocal modulation. Allows exceptionally clear and persuasive speech.

HediffDef.label: loadbearer spine
HediffDef.description: An installed bionic spine with reinforced vertebrae and integrated shock-dampening joints. The frame distributes weight efficiently across the body, allowing the recipient to carry significantly heavier loads.

ThingDef.label: loadbearer spine
ThingDef.description: An advanced artificial spine with reinforced vertebrae and shock-dampening joints. Distributes weight efficiently, allowing significantly heavier loads.

HediffDef.label: multi-digit hand
HediffDef.description: An installed bionic hand with fingers that split into multiple independently articulated sub-digits. Normally the hand looks and functions like a standard prosthetic, but when fine work is required, each finger deploys three miniaturized fingerlets controlled by their own micro-servos. The resulting thirty-digit array can perform extraordinarily complex manipulations at speeds impossible for a natural hand.

ThingDef.label: multi-digit hand
ThingDef.description: An advanced artificial hand with fingers that split into multiple independently articulated sub-digits. The thirty-digit array performs extraordinarily complex manipulations at speeds impossible for a natural hand.

HediffDef.label: power arm
HediffDef.description: An installed bionic arm with a weighted, hardened fist assembly and reinforced servos designed for crushing impacts. The heavy striking surface delivers devastating blunt force trauma capable of shattering bone and caving in armor.

ThingDef.label: power arm
ThingDef.description: An advanced artificial arm with a weighted, hardened fist assembly designed for crushing impacts. Delivers devastating blunt force trauma capable of shattering bone and caving in armor.

HediffDef.label: glaive leg
HediffDef.description: An installed bionic leg with an integrated plasteel blade running along the shin and knee. The leg delivers sweeping slashing kicks that cut through flesh and light armor. A spring-loaded deployment mechanism keeps the blade flush during normal movement.

ThingDef.label: glaive leg
ThingDef.description: An advanced artificial leg with an integrated plasteel blade along the shin and knee. Delivers sweeping slashing kicks that cut through flesh and light armor.
